description: Business letter in Arabic script from Hilāl b. Salmān(?) to his maternal uncle ('my father') Abū Isḥaq Ibrāhīm b. Hillel. Consists entirely of greetings and longing except for reporting that the addressee's sister (the sender's mother) was ill but then recovered. Verso: address of the letter on recto and accounts in the hand of ʿArūs b. Yosef (see separate record).
